---
title: "Installation"
description: "Get MyProject installed in your project."
---

## Requirements

MyProject requires `Node.js ≥ 18` and a modern package manager. It runs in both browser and server environments.

## npm / yarn / pnpm

```bash
npm install myproject        # npm
yarn add myproject           # yarn
pnpm add myproject           # pnpm
```

## CDN (no bundler)

For quick prototyping without a build step:

```html
<script type="module">
  import { create } from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/myproject/+esm'
</script>
```

::: {.callout-note}
CDN builds are not recommended for production. Use a bundler for tree-shaking and optimal bundle size.
:::

## Verify the installation

```js
import { create } from 'myproject'
console.log(create.version) // e.g. "2.4.1"
```

If you see a version number, you're good to go. Head to [Configuration](configuration.qmd) next.
